title: Application for extension of time to lodge an objection – supporting information
description: Information to provide with your objection about an application for an extension of time to lodge an objection.
keywords: Extension, time, lodge, extensions, application for extension

content_blocks.text: To lodge an objection about an application for an extension of time to lodge an objection:

items: complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about an application for an extension of time to lodge an objection includes:

items: the cause of the delay in lodging your objection request
details of the efforts you made to ensure it was lodged on time
when you first became aware that the relevant taxation decision (for example, your assessment notice) was incorrect
how you found out the decision was incorrect
copies of your original assessment notice, return or other documents and correspondence relating to the decision.

content_text:
## How to lodge
To lodge an objection about an application for an extension of time to lodge an objection:
- complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
- provide the supporting information listed below.
## Supporting information
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about an application for an extension of time to lodge an objection includes:
- the cause of the delay in lodging your objection request
- details of the efforts you made to ensure it was lodged on time
- when you first became aware that the relevant taxation decision (for example, your assessment notice) was incorrect
- how you found out the decision was incorrect
- copies of your original assessment notice, return or other documents and correspondence relating to the decision.
